headline: Close the gap: triple your effort today
summary: Today you must triple your deficit pace: lock in portion control and hit the gym hard to counter your 330-day delay.
details: You need −0.58 kg/week starting NOW—your last week hit −0.6 kg, so replicate that every week. Today: eat only Huel portions, zero snacking (you're strong Tues–Thurs, use it), then execute 45 minutes on the rowing machine. You're 330 days behind your June 2027 deadline; every day of discipline matters, and Tuesday is when you're strongest—use it.
